_comment: Hero-image library manifest. Entries are fetched by .github/workflows/fetch-heroes.yml (the build sandbox cannot fetch images directly) and committed as assets/heroes/<slug>.jpg. Two entry forms: {slug, file} = a Wikimedia Commons filename, or {slug, url} = ANY direct image URL on the internet (press/product shots, agency images, official sites — per editor, general internet sourcing is allowed). Always record where it came from in the images.json entry ('source') so the caption attributes it. Failed fetches are skipped, never faked.
